name: Monsterhunter!Lucy Maud Montgomery
description:
[Atsulucy + Atsushi POV]

AU in which Lucy is a monster hunter sent out to slay Atsushi, a weretiger that's been causing trouble for farmers recently, even though he hasn't actually taken any lives so far, who knows what lies in his future? Regardless, Lucy is starting to feel unsure of whether or not she'll be able to finish this job, as she has started to develop feelings for Atsushi after he, through a weird turn of events, saved her life in a fight previously.

She might be a little OOC, but I hope not
creator: vampie_vamp
